title: man-pages bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[6.06-12]
- rtnetlink.7: Document metrics attributes (RTAX_*) (RHEL-86830)

[6.06-11]
- madvise(2): madvise can return EBUSY on MADV_SOFT_OFFLINE requests.
  (RHEL-115501)

[6.06-10]
- Document RWF_ATOMIC, STATX_ATTR_WRITE_ATOMIC flags (RHEL-87647)

[6.06-9]
- Update gating.yaml
